_purpose: Part-4 acceptance gates for the adequately-powered locked test, PRE-REGISTERED and committed BEFORE the 93-question locked capture was scored. Repair/fit params are frozen in accuracy_params.json at this same commit. Not changed after seeing results.

gated_comparisons.selector_vs_phase2: the production selector vs Phase-2 (the incumbent default)
gated_comparisons.causal_vs_generic: scenario-specific causal-latent arm must beat or properly match the generic posterior

gates.G1_brier_lower_than_phase2: selector paired mean Brier vs Phase-2 <= 0
gates.G2_logloss_lower_than_phase2: selector paired mean log-loss vs Phase-2 <= 0
gates.G3_one_primary_CI_favorable: at least one of {Brier, log-loss} paired 95% bootstrap CI (selector vs Phase-2) lies entirely below 0
gates.G4_no_significant_regression: neither primary metric's paired 95% CI lies entirely above 0
gates.G6_catastrophic_rate_not_worse: fraction of questions where |selector - outcome| > 0.5 is <= that of Phase-2 (+0.02 tolerance)
gates.G7_no_severe_domain_regression: no domain with n>=4 has selector Brier worse than Phase-2 by > 0.10
gates.G8_causal_beats_or_matches_generic: causal arm paired log-loss vs the raw generic posterior <= +0.02 (matches or beats)
gates.G9_reproducible: fixed-input arms reproduce exactly (posterior hash stable; offline arms deterministic)

verdict_rule.phase3_accuracy_validated: G1-G5 hold AND G3 holds AND n_completed >= 75 (adequately powered)
verdict_rule.improves_but_underpowered: G1-G5 hold AND G3 holds but n_completed < 75
verdict_rule.inconclusive: G4 holds but G3 does not
verdict_rule.regresses: a primary paired 95% CI lies entirely above 0

production_eligibility_rule: Production-eligible ONLY IF verdict == phase3_accuracy_validated (adequately powered AND gates pass). Otherwise Phase-2 remains the production default and the selector safely returns Phase-2 where Phase-3 lacks demonstrated support.
power_target: n_completed >= 75 locked questions for adequate power.
frozen_fit_summary: fitted hierarchical observation model (per-evidence-class partial-pooled weights) fit on 12 dev-train questions; causal-latent arm Platt-recalibrated (fixes conjunction bias), struct-blend 0.3; production selector = fitted_gated (use the fitted generic rate when >=3 non-neutral effective observations, else Phase-2). All fit on the frozen 23-question DEV set; locked corpus untouched during fitting.
